name: ardur-pipeline
description: Deterministic signal-intelligence pipeline — RSS aggregation, ranking, top-10 synthesis, and design-system adapter.

name: ardur-contracts
description: Shared wire contract for the Ardur AI content pipeline — Zod schemas, TypeScript types, and Tier-1/2 validation.

name: ardur-article-synthesizer
description: Copyright-safe article synthesis from Top-10 topics and clustered sources — stage 4 of the Ardur pipeline.

name: ardur-top10-engine
description: Top-10 signal selector with co-mention graph (ENGINE-008) — deterministic ranking from aggregated clusters.

name: ardur-ranking-engine
description: Multi-signal scoring engine — corroboration, credibility, recency, and diversity for cluster ranking.

name: ardur-news-aggregator
description: RSS and news aggregator — multi-source feed ingest, deduplication, and cluster formation.
